====================================================
Marathon UI + FPS Optimizer (Ultimate Trainer) v2.0
====================================================

Password: marathon2026

FILES INCLUDED:
- MarathonOptimizer.exe (main tool)
- profiles/ (pre-configured settings from top streamers)
- readme.txt (this file)

WHAT THIS TOOL DOES:
- Fixes the chaotic "fontslop" UI that players complained about
- Eliminates RUTABAGA stuttering and FPS drops
- Optimizes Windows for Marathon (Game Mode, HAGS, power plan)
- Applies best in-game settings (DLSS, shadows, FOV) [citation:5]
- Includes sensitivity converter (Destiny 2, Valorant, CS2 → Marathon)
- Network optimizations (UPnP, reduce latency)
- Optional trainer module (God Mode, Infinite Ammo, etc.)

HOW TO USE:
1. Run MarathonOptimizer.exe AS ADMINISTRATOR.
2. Click "Apply All Tweaks".
3. Restart your PC.
4. Launch Marathon and enjoy smooth gameplay.

HOTKEYS (trainer module only, use offline):
F1 - God Mode
F2 - Infinite Ammo
F3 - No Reload
F4 - Speed Hack
F5 - One-Hit Kill

REQUIREMENTS:
- Windows 10/11
- Marathon installed on SSD (recommended)
- NVIDIA or AMD GPU

NOTE: Antivirus may false-positive – it's safe. Add to exclusions.

For support and updates:
https://github.com/yigitturukk/marathon-ui-fps-optimizer-trainer

Based on official Bungie feedback and community-tested optimizations.
